hero.tagline: Bespoke travel experiences across Türkiye — luxury hotels, private transfers, and curated tours crafted for the discerning traveler.
destinations.subtitle: From the Bosphorus to the Cappadocian valleys, the Mediterranean to the Black Sea — each destination is a different chapter of one journey. Scroll to travel.
hotels.subtitle: Handpicked five-star hotels and boutique retreats across Türkiye's most captivating cities — curated for the discerning traveler.
cta.body: Join thousands of travelers who have discovered Türkiye the PoliTrip way. Your perfect journey begins with a single call.

slug.about.title: About Us
slug.about.headline: PoliTrip in brief
slug.about.body: We design premium journeys across Türkiye—VIP experiences, luxury stays, and seamless ground services from arrival to departure.
slug.team.title: Our Team
slug.team.headline: Concierge-first
slug.team.body: Arabic- and English-speaking planners, on-call duty staff, and vetted local partners keep every itinerary calm, clear, and on time.
slug.careers.title: Careers
slug.careers.headline: Join PoliTrip
slug.careers.body: We are growing our operations and guest-experience teams in Istanbul. Send your CV to careers@politrip.com—we read every message.
slug.press.title: Press
slug.press.headline: Media & partnerships
slug.press.body: For press kits, founder interviews, or partnership inquiries, write to press@politrip.com with your outlet and deadline.
slug.help.title: Help Center
slug.help.headline: Guest support
slug.help.body: For changes, refunds policy questions, or on-trip assistance, WhatsApp your duty number or email help@politrip.com with your booking reference.
slug.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
slug.privacy.headline: How we handle data
slug.privacy.body: We collect only what we need to run your trip—contacts, guest names, and booking references—and protect it with standard industry practices. A detailed policy will appear on this page soon.
slug.terms.title: Terms of Service
slug.terms.headline: Booking terms
slug.terms.body: Each proposal lists deposit, balance, and cancellation rules. A trip is confirmed once you approve the itinerary in writing and the agreed deposit is received.
slug.contact.title: Contact
slug.contact.headline: Get in touch with PoliTrip
slug.contact.body: Email info@politrip.com, call any of the regional numbers in the site footer, or message us on WhatsApp. We typically reply within one business day.
slug.about.stat1.label: Founded
slug.about.stat2.label: Happy guests
slug.about.stat3.label: Destinations
slug.about.stat4.label: Languages
slug.about.block1.heading: Who we are
slug.about.block1.body: PoliTrip is a premium boutique travel agency born in Istanbul, dedicated to crafting extraordinary journeys across Türkiye for discerning travelers from the Arab world and beyond.
slug.about.block2.heading: What sets us apart
slug.about.block2.body: Every itinerary is designed from scratch — no templates, no group tours. Our Arabic- and English-speaking team oversees every detail: hotel selection, private transfers, curated experiences, and 24/7 on-the-ground support.
slug.about.block3.heading: Our promise
slug.about.block3.body: From the first enquiry to the final airport drop-off, PoliTrip takes ownership of every logistical detail. We work with a curated network of vetted five-star hotels and trusted local partners.
slug.team.stat1.label: Team members
slug.team.stat2.label: Languages spoken
slug.team.stat3.label: On-call support
slug.team.stat4.label: Personalised service
slug.team.block1.heading: Concierge-first culture
slug.team.block1.body: Our team is built around a single idea: the guest should never have to worry. Every planner is trained to anticipate needs before they arise — from dietary preferences noted before hotel check-in to a car waiting precisely when the flight lands.
slug.team.block2.heading: Multilingual & multicultural
slug.team.block2.body: Our core team speaks Arabic, English, and Turkish fluently. We understand the cultural expectations of Gulf and Levantine travelers, which means everything from prayer-time awareness to halal dining is handled without you ever needing to ask.
slug.team.block3.heading: Local expertise
slug.team.block3.body: Our Istanbul-based operations team has first-hand knowledge of every hotel, restaurant, and experience in our portfolio. We inspect properties personally and only recommend what we would confidently send our own families to.
slug.careers.stat1.label: HQ
slug.careers.stat2.label: Flexible roles
slug.careers.stat3.label: Open positions
slug.careers.block1.heading: Build the future of luxury travel
slug.careers.block1.body: We are growing our guest-experience, operations, and technology teams. If you are passionate about travel, love getting details exactly right, and want to work in a fast-moving environment, PoliTrip could be the right place for you.
slug.careers.block2.heading: Open roles
slug.careers.block2.body: Guest Experience Coordinator (Istanbul, fluent Arabic required) · Senior Operations Executive (Istanbul) · Growth & Partnerships Manager (remote-friendly).
slug.careers.block3.heading: How to apply
slug.careers.block3.body: Send your CV and a short note about why you want to join PoliTrip to careers@politrip.com. We read every message and respond to every qualified candidate within one week.
slug.press.stat1.label: Press features
slug.press.stat2.label: Latest coverage
slug.press.block1.heading: In the media
slug.press.block1.body: PoliTrip has been featured across Arabic and Turkish travel publications for our unique positioning at the intersection of Gulf hospitality standards and authentic Turkish culture.
slug.press.block2.heading: Partnership enquiries
slug.press.block2.body: We collaborate with lifestyle brands, airlines, credit card concierge programmes, and online travel communities whose audiences align with premium travel.
slug.press.block3.heading: Contact our press team
slug.press.block3.body: Email press@politrip.com with your outlet name, circulation or reach, and a brief description of the piece or partnership in mind. We aim to respond within two business days.
slug.help.stat1.label: WhatsApp support
slug.help.stat2.label: Avg. response time
slug.help.block1.heading: Before your trip
slug.help.block1.body: Need to adjust your itinerary, add a service, or ask a question about your upcoming booking? WhatsApp your dedicated planner directly — their number is in your confirmation email.
slug.help.block2.heading: During your trip
slug.help.block2.body: A duty concierge is reachable 24 hours a day, 7 days a week on WhatsApp. Whether you need a last-minute restaurant, have a transport issue, or just need a local recommendation, we are one message away.
slug.help.block3.heading: Cancellations & changes
slug.help.block3.body: Cancellation and amendment rules vary by hotel and supplier. Your booking confirmation lists the exact deadlines. For time-sensitive requests, always contact us by WhatsApp for the fastest response.
slug.privacy.block1.heading: What data we collect
slug.privacy.block1.body: We collect only the information necessary to plan and deliver your trip: full name, contact details, travel dates, and any special requests. We do not collect or store payment card data directly.
slug.privacy.block2.heading: How we use your data
slug.privacy.block2.body: Your data is used exclusively to fulfil your booking and communicate with you about your trip. We share details with hotels and suppliers only to the extent necessary for your reservation.
slug.privacy.block3.heading: Your rights
slug.privacy.block3.body: You may request a copy of the data we hold, ask us to correct inaccuracies, or request deletion at any time by emailing privacy@politrip.com. We will respond within 14 days.
slug.terms.block1.heading: Booking confirmation
slug.terms.block1.body: A booking is confirmed when you have approved the itinerary in writing and the agreed deposit has been received. Verbal agreements and unsigned quotes do not constitute a reservation.
slug.terms.block2.heading: Payment schedule
slug.terms.block2.body: A deposit of 30–50% is due at confirmation. The remaining balance is due no later than 14 days before the first service date. Accepted methods include bank transfer, Wise, and approved card payments.
slug.terms.block3.heading: Cancellations & refunds
slug.terms.block3.body: Cancellations 30+ days before departure are eligible for a full refund minus a 5% processing fee. Within 14 days of departure are non-refundable unless due to force majeure.
slug.contact.stat1.label: Operations HQ
slug.contact.wa.title: WhatsApp
slug.contact.wa.desc: Fastest response — our team replies within minutes during business hours.
slug.contact.email.title: Email
slug.contact.email.desc: Send us your itinerary wishlist and we'll get back to you within one business day.
slug.contact.block1.heading: General enquiries
slug.contact.block1.body: For trip planning, pricing, and availability, email info@politrip.com or message us on WhatsApp. We typically reply within a few hours during business hours (09:00–21:00 Istanbul time, 7 days a week).
slug.contact.block2.heading: Phone & WhatsApp
slug.contact.block2.body: Istanbul: +90 552 686 75 59. WhatsApp is the fastest channel for real-time assistance — we are available 7 days a week.
slug.contact.block3.heading: Office visits
slug.contact.block3.body: Our Istanbul office is available for in-person meetings by appointment. Please email us to schedule a time and we will share the exact address and directions.
slug.vision.stat1.label: Expansion horizon
slug.vision.stat2.label: Countries planned
slug.vision.stat3.label: Arabic-speaking travel agency in Türkiye
slug.vision.block1.heading: Where we are going
slug.vision.block1.body: PoliTrip was founded on the belief that premium travel should feel genuinely effortless. Our long-term vision is to become the definitive luxury travel brand for Arabic-speaking travelers exploring Türkiye and the broader region.
slug.vision.block2.heading: Technology meets hospitality
slug.vision.block2.body: We are investing in digital tools that give guests real-time visibility into their itineraries, instant concierge access, and curated destination intelligence.
slug.vision.block3.heading: Sustainability & community
slug.vision.block3.body: We are committed to responsible tourism: partnering with locally owned properties, avoiding mass-tourism circuits, and ensuring economic benefit flows into the communities that make Türkiye extraordinary.
slug.vip.stat1.label: Hotels only
slug.vip.stat2.label: Concierge
slug.vip.stat3.label: Private
slug.vip.stat4.label: Destinations
slug.vip.block1.heading: Travel without compromise
slug.vip.block1.body: PoliTrip's VIP tier places a dedicated concierge at your side from the moment your flight lands. Every transfer, every suite, every experience — arranged in advance, executed flawlessly.
slug.vip.block2.heading: What is included
slug.vip.block2.body: Private jet and helicopter transfers, five-star suite reservations, Bosphorus yacht charters, exclusive after-hours site visits, private chef dinners, and a dedicated travel manager.
slug.vip.block3.heading: How to book
slug.vip.block3.body: VIP experiences are bespoke by definition. Contact our VIP team via WhatsApp or email and we will schedule a call to design an itinerary around your exact wishes.
slug.vision.title: Our Vision
slug.vision.headline: Redefining luxury travel in Türkiye
slug.vision.body: PoliTrip was born from a simple belief: high-end travel should feel effortless. We curate every detail — from the first inquiry to the final transfer — so guests experience Türkiye at its finest without a single logistical worry. Our vision is a world where premium travel is personal, seamless, and unforgettable.
slug.hotels.title: Partner Hotels
slug.hotels.headline: Handpicked luxury stays
slug.hotels.body: Every property in our portfolio is personally vetted for location, service quality, and guest experience. From boutique heritage palaces in Istanbul to cliffside retreats in Cappadocia and beachfront resorts in Antalya, our hotels are chosen to match the elevated standard our guests expect.
slug.vip.title: VIP Experience
slug.vip.headline: Travel without compromise
slug.vip.body: PoliTrip's VIP Experience is the highest tier of private travel in Türkiye.
vip.intro: PoliTrip's VIP tier places a dedicated concierge at your side from the moment your flight lands. Every transfer, every suite, every experience — arranged in advance, executed flawlessly.
vip.servicesTitle: Everything arranged. Nothing left to chance.
vip.servicesSubtitle: A curated suite of exclusive services, each available individually or as part of a fully bespoke itinerary.
vip.service1.title: Private Jet & Charter Flights
vip.service1.desc: Skip commercial terminals entirely. We arrange private jet charters and FBO handling so your journey begins the moment you board.
vip.service2.title: Yacht & Bosphorus Charters
vip.service2.desc: Cruise the Bosphorus or the Aegean on a private gulet or superyacht — sunset dinners, overnight anchoring, fully crewed.
vip.service3.title: Five-Star Hotel Suites
vip.service3.desc: Personally vetted five-star properties in Istanbul, Cappadocia, Antalya and beyond — reserved with priority access and VIP amenities.
vip.service4.title: Helicopter Transfers
vip.service4.desc: City-to-city or resort-to-resort helicopter transfers with panoramic views over the Bosphorus, Cappadocia valleys, and coastline.
vip.service5.title: Luxury Ground Transport
vip.service5.desc: A fleet of premium vehicles with professional chauffeurs, meet-and-greet at every arrival, and 24-hour availability.
vip.service6.title: Private Guides & Concierge
vip.service6.desc: Expert multilingual guides, exclusive after-hours access to major sites, restaurant reservations, and a dedicated on-call concierge.
vip.ctaTitle: Ready to experience Türkiye at its finest?
vip.ctaBody: Speak with our VIP concierge team and let us design your perfect journey — no templates, no compromises.
